classes.description: Override or extend the styles applied to the component.

currentUser.description: The local user sending messages. If omitted, derived from members by finding the entry with role === 'user'. Also used to enrich message authors when a rendered message resolves to currentUser.id.

density.description: The vertical spacing density of chat messages. - 'compact' – Reduced vertical spacing between messages. - 'standard' – Default spacing. - 'comfortable' – Increased vertical spacing between messages.

features.description: Feature flags to enable or disable built-in ChatBox behaviours.

getMessageAuthorAvatarUrl.description: Used to determine the avatar URL for a given message author. Falls back to message.author?.avatarUrl, then to the matched member's avatarUrl.

getMessageAuthorDisplayName.description: Used to determine the display name for a given message author. Falls back to message.author?.displayName, then to the matched member's displayName.

getMessageAuthorId.description: Used to determine the author id for a given message. The resolved id is used to match message authors against currentUser, members, and active conversation participants.

initialActiveConversationId.description: The initial active conversation ID when uncontrolled. Ignored after initialization and when activeConversationId is provided.

initialComposerValue.description: The initial composer value when uncontrolled. Ignored after initialization and when composerValue is provided.

initialConversations.description: The initial conversations when uncontrolled. Ignored after initialization and when conversations is provided.

initialMessages.description: The initial messages when uncontrolled. Ignored after initialization and when messages is provided.

layoutMode.description: Forces the responsive layout mode instead of deriving it from the container width. When omitted, ChatBox chooses the mode automatically using layoutModeBreakpoints.

layoutModeBreakpoints.description: Container-width breakpoints used when layoutMode is not provided.

members.description:
Known chat participants.
Used to derive the local user / assistant user when explicit props are omitted,
and to enrich message authors by resolved author id at render time.

roleDisplayNames.description: Locale-driven fallback labels for messages without explicit author information.

slotProps.description: Props forwarded to each slot. Mirrors the flat keys of slots.

slots.description:
The components used for each slot inside the ChatBox. Keys are flat and prefixed by area:

- Layout — root, layout, conversationsPane, threadPane. - Conversation — conversationRoot, conversationList, conversationHeader, conversationHeaderInfo, conversationTitle, conversationSubtitle, conversationHeaderActions. - Message list — messageList, messageGroup, dateDivider, unreadMarker, streamingIndicator. The divider slots render only when the matching features.dateDivider / features.unreadMarker flag is enabled; the streaming indicator renders by default (features.streamingIndicator: 'auto') and accepts null to hide it. - Message — messageRoot, messageAvatar, messageContent, messageMeta, messageInlineMeta, messageError, messageActions, messageAuthorName. Pass null to a presentational slot (messageAvatar, messageMeta, messageInlineMeta, messageActions, messageAuthorName) to hide it and collapse the surrounding layout. - Composer — composerRoot, composerInput, composerSendButton, composerAttachButton, composerAttachmentList, composerToolbar, composerHelperText. Pass null to composerSendButton / composerAttachButton to hide the button. - Widgets — typingIndicator, scrollToBottom, suggestions, emptyState.

*Root slots (conversationRoot, messageRoot, composerRoot) are wrapper-only: they swap the styled element while the default children still render inside.

storeClass.description: The store class to use for this provider.

streamFlushInterval.description: Flush interval in milliseconds for batching rapid streaming deltas before applying them to the store.

suggestions.description:
Prompt suggestions displayed in the empty state.
Clicking a suggestion pre-fills the composer.

suggestionsAutoSubmit.description: Whether clicking a suggestion automatically submits the message.

variant.description: The visual layout variant of the chat. - 'default' – Standard layout with avatars, individual timestamps, and full spacing. - 'compact' – Messenger-style layout: no avatars, author + timestamp in group header, tighter spacing.

slotDescriptions.composerAttachButton:
Attach button. Pass `null` to hide just the button while keeping the rest of
the attachment pipeline (drag/drop, paste). Use `features.attachments: false`
to disable attachments entirely.
slotDescriptions.composerHelperText: The helper / disclaimer text below the input.
slotDescriptions.composerRoot:
Styled root of `<ChatComposer>` (wrapper-only); the default attach/input/send/
toolbar render inside it.
slotDescriptions.composerSendButton: Send button. Pass `null` to hide it; the form still submits on Enter.
slotDescriptions.conversationHeader: The header bar rendered above the message list.
slotDescriptions.conversationHeaderActions: The actions area on the trailing side of the header.
slotDescriptions.conversationHeaderInfo: The title + subtitle group inside the header.
slotDescriptions.conversationRoot:
Styled root of `<ChatConversation>` (wrapper-only); the default header,
message list and composer continue to render inside it.
slotDescriptions.conversationsPane: Container for the conversation-list sidebar (or drawer on narrow widths).
slotDescriptions.conversationSubtitle: The conversation subtitle element (participants, status, etc.).
slotDescriptions.dateDivider:
The date separator rendered between message groups. Only rendered when
`features.dateDivider` is enabled. Pass `null` to hide it.
slotDescriptions.emptyState: Custom content rendered when the thread has no messages.
slotDescriptions.layout: Wrapper that arranges the conversations pane and the thread pane.
slotDescriptions.messageActions:
Actions row component (receives `{ messageId }`). Pass `null` to hide
actions entirely; omit to render only the declarative `extraActions` from
`slotProps.messageActions` if provided.
slotDescriptions.messageAuthorName:
Author name label rendered by the group wrapper (default variant: above the
bubble; compact variant: inside the message grid). Pass `null` to hide.
slotDescriptions.messageAvatar:
Avatar component. Pass `null` to hide the avatar entirely and drop the
reserved avatar grid track.
slotDescriptions.messageError:
Error card shown under the bubble when the message status is `error`.
Pass `null` to hide the error surface entirely (no component is mounted).
slotDescriptions.messageGroup: The per-author group wrapper around consecutive messages.
slotDescriptions.messageInlineMeta: Inline meta rendered inside the bubble (default variant). Pass `null` to hide.
slotDescriptions.messageList:
Styled scrollable root element of `<ChatMessageList>` (wrapper-only). The
default message rows render inside it, so a plain element such as `'section'`
wraps the list rather than replacing it.
slotDescriptions.messageMeta: External meta (compact variant). Pass `null` to hide.
slotDescriptions.messageRoot:
Styled root of `<ChatMessage>` (wrapper-only); the default avatar/content/meta
tree still renders inside it.
slotDescriptions.streamingIndicator:
The animated dots shown while an assistant response is in flight: as a
trailing row while waiting for the response to start, then inside the
assistant bubble while it streams. Controlled by
`features.streamingIndicator` (`'auto'` by default). Pass `null` to hide it.
slotDescriptions.threadPane: Container for the active thread — the message list plus the composer.
slotDescriptions.typingIndicator: The animated typing indicator shown while the assistant responds.
slotDescriptions.unreadMarker:
The "new messages" marker. Only rendered when `features.unreadMarker` is
enabled. Pass `null` to hide it.
